textByHash.644b83d14114a5efa930e24b12c4e78998e39363: I'm a black-market trader. Fancy taking a look at my wares?
textByHash.5ae5d1f773ddf240f71634c0fd68220a165c0056: Well then, young lad, that is a good question. In fact, I specifically deal in vyrewatch uniforms. They might leave you alone a bit more if they think you're one of them!
textByHash.9e29deb74c0f73ca9e19f90197f8c8b97dc4fec1: Well then, young lass, that is a good question. In fact, I specifically deal in vyrewatch uniforms. They might leave you alone a bit more if they think you're one of them!
textByHash.d750d66e745c03c813b928fc3c894f50c3738ecc: Makes it easier to move around the sectors without them demanding a blood tithe every time you dare breathe. So then, do you wanna have a look at my stuff?
textByHash.59faa8c11c73e0e72a4595b0e0ec991330c562eb: You're in sector one of Meiyerditch. And don't forget, we're all here forever.
textByHash.a9ac4250f2a0a81a7aaaad2b251c11100448d9b8: Oh... Sorry, we're not meant to talk to the nobles.
